## Change type

## Guardrails

- [ ] I did not include student names, grades, diagnoses, parent communication, credentials, tokens, confidential school documents, copyrighted textbook content, private vault/export content, or generated local runtime state.
- [ ] I checked whether this change needs Agent-OS. If it does, the matching spec is `Ready` or `In Progress`.
- [ ] I kept Agent-OS, specs, tests, `.claude/`, `.github/`, `AGENTS.md`, and `CLAUDE.md` out of user release packages.
- [ ] I documented privacy, security, release-boundary, curriculum, or vault/memory risks when relevant.

## Verification

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `python scripts/build_release.py --version dev --check`
- [ ] Other:
